name: audio_keepalive
description: Maintains continuous audio output to prevent HDMI/SPDIF/USB signal loss during idle
author: Just a Nerd

volumio_info.details: Feeds silence to the audio output during idle to prevent HDMI receivers, SPDIF decoders, and USB DACs from losing signal lock
volumio_info.changelog: v1.1.1: HDMI/iec958 chain initialization bug fixes and improvements.
